title: ConvertKit vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit and Klaviyo: pricing, features, and which email platform suits your business best.
intro: ConvertKit and Klaviyo are both powerful email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. ConvertKit is purpose-built for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce automation. Choosing between them depends on your business model and specific marketing needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Creator-focused with landing pages and commerce

choose_a_if: You're a creator, blogger, or online course seller looking for an affordable email platform
You need built-in landing pages and want to earn recurring affiliate commissions
You prefer visual automation builders and straightforward subscriber management
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify, WooCommerce, or similar platforms
You want SMS marketing capabilities integrated with email automation
You need advanced segmentation and predictive analytics for customer behavior

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. ConvertKit excels for content creators with better pricing and creator-specific features, while Klaviyo is superior for e-commerce brands needing advanced automation and SMS integration. Klaviyo scores higher on review platforms (4.6 G2, 3.8 Trustpilot) but serves a different market.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Klaviyo?
faq.a: ConvertKit is cheaper overall with a free tier for 1,000 subscribers and paid plans starting at $29/month. Klaviyo's free tier caps at 500 subscribers and starts at $45/month. However, pricing increases with subscriber count on both platforms, so long-term costs depend on your growth.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list exports, making migration possible. You can export your subscriber data and import it into ConvertKit, though you may lose some advanced segmentation or automation history. Most users can complete the switch within a few hours to a day.
